mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO stock_minute_data ( stock_code, trade_date, time, price, avg_price, minute_volume, minute_amount, high_price, low_price, create_time ) VALUES
( #{item.stockCode}, #{item.tradeDate}, #{item.time}, #{item.price}, #{item.avgPrice}, #{item.minuteVolume}, #{item.minuteAmount}, #{item.highPrice}, #{item.lowPrice}, #{item.createTime} )
